openshift-self-managed.description: Red Hat Assisted Installer MCP server for self-managed clusters (OCP, SNO). Uses Assisted Installer API for cluster creation and management.

openshift-ocm-managed.description: Red Hat OCM MCP server for managed service clusters (ROSA, ARO, OSD). Uses OCM API for cluster listing and management.

args: U=(); [ "$(uname -s)" = Linux ] && U=(--userns=keep-id:uid=65532,gid=65532); exec podman run "${U[@]}" --rm -i --network=host -v "${KUBECONFIG}:/kubeconfig:ro,Z" --entrypoint /openshift-mcp-server quay.io/redhat-user-workloads/crt-nshift-lightspeed-tenant/openshift-mcp-server@sha256:2f52c860f91ab3c8a5129b727bdef0d620e733013f073b10355866c45eafd053 --kubeconfig /kubeconfig --read-only --toolsets core,config
openshift-administration.description: Red Hat OpenShift MCP server for multi-cluster administration and reporting
